title: Calculadora de Porcentajes
whatIsDesc: Calcula qué porcentaje es un número de otro.
changeDesc: Calcula el aumento o disminución porcentual entre dos números.
addDesc: Suma o resta un porcentaje de un número.
seoDescription: Calculate percentages easily: find what percent one number is of another, calculate percentage increase or decrease, and find the percentage of a number. This free percent calculator handles all common percentage problems in seconds.
